About Me

Civil Engineering student proficient in AutoCAD, Revit, Navisworks, Tekla Structures, Civil 3D, and SAP2000. Experienced in BIM modeling, steel structure design, bridge engineering, and multi-story building projects.

Skills

AutoCAD Revit Navisworks Tekla Structures Civil 3D SAP2000

Featured Projects

Balinese Architecture Gate

3D design and visualization of a traditional Balinese gate featuring gold ornaments and classic Balinese architectural elements.

Steel Truss Bridge

Modeling and structural analysis of a through truss bridge using Tekla Structures.

5-Story Steel Structure

Structural analysis and design of a 5-story steel building using SAP2000.

BIM Coordination

Multi-story building project coordination using Navisworks with clash detection and model review.

Building Modeling

Detailed building modeling using Revit including floor plans, sections, and 3D views.
